action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC 0.7475 with val AUC 0.7490. Model still overfits - val AUC plateaus by epoch 26-29 while training loss keeps decreasing. Analysis: Key issues are overfitting on small dataset (2180 train sequences). Two promising improvements: (1) Interaction dropout - randomly zero out correct embeddings during training forces model to rely less on individual interactions, (2) SWA (Stochastic Weight Averaging) - averages model weights from later epochs for better generalization, (3) Label smoothing - prevents overconfidence. Decision: Implement all three improvements, train for 50 epochs (30 regular + 20 SWA phase with constant LR), and submit eval.
